languages.text:
Wearer gains immunity to Toxin, falling prone, being pushed and getting Staggered. It also has reduced dodge penalty.
However the material is extremely flammable -- wearer gains -30 penalty on tests to remove burning, burning deals double damage to them and taking any fire damage inflicts Burning 6.

traits.locale_text:
Wearer gains immunity to Toxin, falling prone, being pushed and getting Staggered. It also has reduced dodge penalty.
However the material is extremely flammable -- wearer gains -30 penalty on tests to remove burning, burning deals double damage to them and taking any fire damage inflicts Burning 6.

languages.text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.
languages.original_text:
Wearer gains immunity to Toxin, falling prone, being pushed and getting Staggered. It also has reduced dodge penalty.
However the material is extremely flammable -- wearer gains -30 penalty on tests to remove burning, burning deals double damage to them and taking any fire damage inflicts Burning 6.

traits.locale_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away or staggered. Additionaly, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the weather makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffer double burning damage, and taking fire damage inflicts 6 levels of burning on them.

The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers +6 levels of burning.

languages.text:
Персонаж невосприимчив к отравлению, а также его нельзя опрокинуть, оттолкнуть или ошеломить. Кроме того, его штраф к уклонению снижен.
Но материал, из которого сделана эта броня, очень хорошо горит, поэтому персонаж проходит проверки на снятие горения со штрафом −30, получает удвоенный урон от горения, а каждый случай получения огненного урона накладывает на него 6 уровней горения.
languages.original_text:

However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

Но материал, из которого сделана эта броня, очень хорошо горит, поэтому персонаж проходит проверки на снятие горения со штрафом −30, получает удвоенный урон от горения, а каждый случай получения огненного урона накладывает на него +6 уровней горения.

languages.text:
El portador es inmune a toxina y no puede ser derribado, empujado ni desequilibrado. Además se reduce su penalización a esquiva.
Sin embargo, el material de la armadura es extremadamente inflamable: el portador sufre una penalización de −30 a cualquier prueba para eliminar quemadura, sufre doble daño por quemadura y, al sufrir daño por quemadura, sufre 6 niveles de quemadura.
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
El portador es inmune a toxina y no puede ser derribado, empujado ni desequilibrado. Además se reduce su penalización a esquiva.
Sin embargo, el material de la armadura es extremadamente inflamable: el portador sufre una penalización de −30 a cualquier prueba para eliminar quemadura, sufre doble daño por quemadura y, al sufrir daño por quemadura, sufre 6 niveles de quemadura.

languages.text:
Der Träger ist immun gegen Gift und kann nicht hingestreckt, zurückgestoßen oder zum Taumeln gebracht werden. Außerdem ist sein Ausweichen-Abzug niedriger.
Allerdings ist das Material dieser Rüstung hochentzündlich. Der Träger absolviert alle Prüfungen zur Entfernung von Verbrennen mit einem Abzug von −30, erleidet doppelten Feuerschaden und 6 Stufen Verbrennen, wenn er Feuer fängt.
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
Der Träger ist immun gegen Gift und kann nicht hingestreckt, zurückgestoßen oder zum Taumeln gebracht werden. Außerdem ist sein Ausweichen-Abzug niedriger.
Allerdings ist das Material dieser Rüstung hochentzündlich. Der Träger absolviert alle Prüfungen zur Entfernung von Verbrennen mit einem Abzug von −30, erleidet doppelten Feuerschaden und +6 Stufen Verbrennen, wenn er Feuer fängt.

languages.text:
Le porteur est invulnérable aux effets Toxine, Paralysie et Sidération, et ne peut pas être repoussé. De plus, sa pénalité d'esquive est réduite.
Cependant, cette armure est faite d'un matériau extrêmement inflammable : le porteur réalise tous les tests de suppression de Combustion avec une pénalité de -30, subit le double de dégâts de Combustion et, lorsqu'il subit des dégâts de feu, reçoit 6 niveaux de Combustion.
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
Le porteur est invulnérable aux effets Toxine, Paralysie et Sidération, et ne peut pas être repoussé. De plus, sa pénalité d'esquive est réduite.
Cependant, cette armure est faite d'un matériau extrêmement inflammable : le porteur réalise tous les tests de suppression de Combustion avec une pénalité de -30, subit le double de dégâts de Combustion et, lorsqu'il subit des dégâts de feu, reçoit +6 niveaux de Combustion.

languages.text:
Giyen kişi, toksine karşı bağışıktır. Yere devrilemez, itilemez veya afallatılamaz. Ayrıca kaçınma ceza puanı da azalır.
Bununla beraber zırh, aşırı kolay tutuşabilen bir malzemeden yapılmıştır. Giyen kişi; yanmayı ortadan kaldıran tüm testleri −30 ceza puanı ile yapar, iki katı yanma hasarına maruz kalır ve ateş hasarı aldığında 6 seviye yanmaya maruz kalır.
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
Giyen kişi, toksine karşı bağışıktır. Yere devrilemez, itilemez veya afallatılamaz. Ayrıca kaçınma ceza puanı da azalır.
Bununla beraber zırh, aşırı kolay tutuşabilen bir malzemeden yapılmıştır. Giyen kişi; yanmayı ortadan kaldıran tüm testleri −30 ceza puanı ile yapar, iki katı yanma hasarına maruz kalır ve ateş hasarı aldığında +6 seviye yanmaya maruz kalır.

languages.text:
装备者免疫毒素，且不会倒地、被击退或恐慌。此外，装备者的闪避减值降低。
然而，该护甲的材质极为易燃：装备者进行移除燃烧的所有检定时带有30的减值，受到双倍燃烧伤害，且受到火焰伤害时承受6层燃烧。
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
装备者免疫毒素，且不会倒地、被击退或恐慌。此外，装备者的闪避减值降低。
然而，该护甲的材质极为易燃：装备者进行移除燃烧的所有检定时带有30的减值，受到双倍燃烧伤害，且受到火焰伤害时承受6层燃烧。

languages.text:
毒に耐性があり、伏せたり、押されたり、よろめいたりすることができない。さらに、回避のペナルティが軽減される。
しかし、この鎧の素材は非常に燃えやすい。火傷を治すための全てのテストに-30のペナルティが加わる。火傷のダメージは2倍になり、火傷を受けた場合、6レベルの火傷を受ける。
languages.original_text:
The wearer is immune to toxin and cannot fall prone, be pushed away, or staggered. Additionally, their dodge penalty is reduced.
However, the material this armour is made of is extremely flammable: the wearer makes all tests to remove burning with a −30 penalty, suffers double burning damage, and upon taking fire damage, suffers 6 levels of burning.

traits.locale_text:
毒に耐性があり、伏せたり、押されたり、よろめいたりすることができない。さらに、回避のペナルティが軽減される。
しかし、この鎧の素材は非常に燃えやすい。火傷を治すための全てのテストに-30のペナルティが加わる。火傷のダメージは2倍になり、火傷を受けた場合、6レベルの火傷を受ける。
